name: Peanut Butter Balls
recipeIngredient: 1 pound dipping chocolate or powdered sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, stir together powdered sugar, creamy peanut butter, and butter until well combined.
2. Shape the candy into 1-inch balls.
3. Place the balls on a baking sheet lined with wax paper.
4. Let the balls stand about 20 minutes, or until dry.
5. Melt the dipping chocolate and dip the balls.
6. Let them stand to dry or roll in powdered sugar.
7. Store tightly covered in a cool, dry place.
NOTE: I have never dipped them in chocolate and frozen them, but I have when they were rolled in powdered sugar and they tasted wonderful! I made these ahead of time, maybe 3 months, and they were great!
